title: Alternate Nylium
description: Changes the warped forest and crimson forest of the nether into the void forest and the verdant forest!
body:
🍄 Alternate Nylium
-
🢂 Changes the warped forest and crimson forest into the verdant and void forest, with fresh new color palettes!

🢂 Vanilla style




💡 Info & Help
